---
title: "resolve_link"
generated: true
description: "Resolve a `str` name or a `Link` instance to a `Link`."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.glm`](../nitrix-stats-glm.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.stats._family`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:resolve_link -->
```python
resolve_link(link: Union[str, Link]) -> Link
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:resolve_link -->
Resolve a `str` name or a `Link` instance to a `Link`.

Built-ins: `'identity'` / `'log'` / `'logit'` / `'probit'` /
`'cloglog'` / `'sqrt'` / `'inverse'`; or pass a `Link` directly.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:resolve_link -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `link` | `Union[str, Link]` | — | — | — |

**Returns** `Link`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
